purpose: Lean execution-governance wrapper for Mazao AI surgical work. Inspired by NDII discipline, but not a duplication, dependency, or runtime integration of NDII-Kernel.

binding_rules.rule_01: No prompt may execute unless previous prompt mandate is explicitly verified as completed.
binding_rules.rule_02: Every prompt must declare one objective only.
binding_rules.rule_03: No file may be touched unless explicitly listed in allowed_files.
binding_rules.rule_04: No function/class/module may be changed unless explicitly listed in allowed_symbols or directly required within allowed_files for the objective.
binding_rules.rule_05: No new feature, no refactor, no cleanup, no renaming, no optimization outside stated objective.
binding_rules.rule_06: No schema change unless prompt explicitly states SCHEMA_CHANGE_ALLOWED=true.
binding_rules.rule_07: If previous mandate is incomplete, executor must halt and return BLOCKER_REPORT.
binding_rules.rule_08: If uncertainty exists, executor must fail closed, halt, and return BLOCKER_REPORT.
binding_rules.rule_09: If scope pressure appears during execution, executor must not continue by judgment call; executor must halt and report.
binding_rules.rule_10: Every prompt must reference project roles, commit/push breakpoint policy, and machine-readable supervisor report requirement.
binding_rules.rule_11: No next prompt may be executed until prior report status is PASSED or COMPLETED.
binding_rules.rule_12: Every completion report must be under 120 lines and machine-readable.
binding_rules.rule_13: All changes must minimize LOC and blast radius.
binding_rules.rule_14: Any collateral impact must be explicitly stated, even if zero.
binding_rules.rule_15: Mazao governance is binding even when not restated in full; prompt-local scope rules are additive, not substitutive.

default_forbidden_actions: test suite expansion unless explicitly requested

policy: Do not commit before mandate is satisfied.
Do not push before validation passes.
If mandate is partial, do not commit/push; return BLOCKER_REPORT or PARTIAL_REPORT only if explicitly allowed.
If prompt explicitly requests commit, commit only after validation.
If prompt explicitly requests push, push only after commit and validation.
If commit hash is produced, include it in completion report.

minimum_required_checks: targeted regression validation for untouched adjacent path

reporting_contract.required_terminal_string: return under 120 lines machine readable report for supervisors
